channel.title: Blog on jqknono Blogs
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on jqknono Blogs

item.title: Approach to continuing using A/ models
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: What matters is the model; the gap between harnesses isn’t that big. Recently A/ has opened up some reverse-proxy access, so it’s worth trying other harness tools. opencode, copilot cli, etc. are all good.

item.title: Share something fun, GitHub account rating
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: By default it uses the stepfun model to judge the personal data obtainable from the GitHub API, quite fun https://githubroast.dev/ #vibecodingfestival[topic]#

item.title: How to Avoid Cyberbullying
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description:
Introduction

In the digital era, the Internet has become an important part of our daily lives. However, with the expansion of cyberspace, the social issue of cyberbullying has become increasingly prominent. Cyberbullying refers to the act of maliciously attacking, insulting, defaming, or harassing others through Internet platforms. It not only infringes upon the legitimate rights and interests of individuals but can also cause serious harm to the mental health of victims. This article aims to explore the main forms of cyberbullying, analyze its harms, and provide practical prevention strategies to help users effectively protect their own safety while enjoying the convenience of the Internet.

item.title: A nice deal, Grok $30 for three months
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: I used to most recommend chatgpt plus, but the other day chatgpt banned my codex. Logging into codex again requires SMS two-factor authentication. Since it was a number from a code-receiving platform, openai does not support self-service phone number rebinding…

item.title: If Zhipu's stock price falls, where will the money flow?
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: Zhipu’s model performance is decent, but its engineering capability is limited, and subscription users can feel the service quality. The advantage of glm5.2 is rigorous thinking, at the cost of low token efficiency, leading to a higher overall price. Assuming most users do appreciate well-performing models…

item.title: opencode go supports multiple simultaneous subscriptions
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: Create multiple workspaces, each workspace can subscribe to one go. Workspaces can be created freely. No need to create multiple accounts, unless to take advantage of the $5 deal.

item.title: WeChat Input Method voice supports removing filler words alu!
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: Archive of a Xiaohongshu short post about WeChat Input Method voice supporting removal of filler words alu!

item.title: opencode go subscription launches glm5.2, genuine glm5.2!
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: The second screenshot is enough to prove it’s genuine, the familiar 1302 flavor. Stable to use on 6.18, speed is quite good, maybe the supplier no longer uses z.ai. In practice, it’s stronger than deepseekv4pro in coding, script error rate…

item.title: Learn Product Design from Big Tech
item.author: https://blog.jqknono.com (jqknono)
item.description: Page 1: As the repayment due date approaches, the most important action is ‘make repayment’ rather than ‘repay with ease’, yet the visual emphasis is on ‘repay with ease’. ‘Repay with ease’ actually refers to installment repayment. Page 2: What matters is ‘how much is the interest’ rather than ‘how much interest is reduced’…
